faq.headline: Common questions
faq.q1: Do you ship across Saudi Arabia?
faq.a1: Yes — we offer free standard shipping on all orders above 200 SAR across the Kingdom, with express options available at checkout.
faq.a2: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. The product must be in its original condition and packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.
faq.q3: Am I eligible for Tamara installments?
faq.a3: Yes. Tamara is available at checkout for eligible orders. Split your total into 4 interest-free instalments — no hidden fees.
faq.q4: Which hair types does the styler work on?
faq.a4: The Dahlia Styler works on all hair types — fine, thick, curly, straight, and colour-treated hair. Adjustable heat settings let you tailor the temperature to your exact hair type.
faq.q5: What is included in the Vanity Case?
faq.a5: The Full Kit includes the Dahlia Pro Styler, a signature quilted vanity case, a heat-resistant mat, and a compact travel pouch.
faq.a6: All Dahlia products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranty options are available at checkout.

product.tamara: or 4 × {{ amount }} ر.س interest-free with Tamara

payment_note: We accept Mada and STC Pay

how_to_use.title: Master Your Styler
how_to_use.step_1_desc: Start with dry or slightly damp hair for the smoothest, longest-lasting results.
how_to_use.step_2_desc: Divide your hair into manageable sections for even coverage from root to tip.
how_to_use.step_3_desc: Select from 5 styling modes — straighten, curl, wave, volumise, or smooth.
how_to_use.step_4_desc: Move the Dahlia Styler smoothly from root to tip in one confident, fluid motion.
how_to_use.step_5_desc: Lock in your style with a light finishing product and enjoy all-day hold.

reviews.title: What our customers say
reviews.review_1_text: "The Dahlia Styler has completely transformed my morning routine. I get salon-quality results in half the time."
reviews.review_2_text: "Worth every riyal. The ionic technology really does reduce frizz — my hair has never been this smooth."
reviews.review_3_text: "I travel frequently and the dual voltage is a lifesaver. The vanity case packaging is gorgeous too."
reviews.review_4_text: "Tried every styler out there — nothing compares. Five modes, one device, absolutely no compromise."
reviews.review_5_text: "The packaging alone made it feel like a luxury gift. The product itself is even better than I expected."
